description: Create a complete brain tumor documentation package from the loaded glioma MRI (FLAIR and T1_Contrast). Perform bidimensional measurements of the tumor and capture annotated screenshots in axial, sagittal, and coronal planes. Save screenshots to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/Documentation/axial_view.png, ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/Documentation/sagittal_view.png, and ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/Documentation/coronal_view.png. Save measurement markup to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/Documentation/measurements.mrk.json. Save the report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/Documentation/documentation_report.json with fields: patient_id, finding, max_axial_diameter_mm, perpendicular
